title: Section 81
content: (1) The Chairperson may, if he thinks fit, employ one or more competent persons to give advice or assistance in connection with the valuation of any land or building, and any person so employed shall have power, at all reasonable times and after giving due notice, and on production, if so required, of authorisation in writing in that behalf from the Chairperson, to enter on, survey and value any land or building which the Chairperson may direct him to survey and value. (2) No person shall willfully delay or obstruct any such person in the exercise of any of his powers under this section.
